params.arg0:
FROM logs-system.auth-*
| WHERE host.name == "db-1" AND event.outcome == "failure"
| STATS failed = COUNT(*) BY source.ip
| SORT failed DESC

raw_command: esql 'FROM logs-system.auth-* | WHERE host.name == "db-1" AND event.outcome == "failure" | STATS failed = COUNT(*) BY source.ip | SORT failed DESC'
